title: Unofficial Sodium Biome Blending Fix
description: An unofficial patch for Sodium that prevents it from blending colours of unwanted blocks
body:
This is a temporary fix for Sodium's [issue #895](https://github.com/CaffeineMC/sodium-fabric/issues/895) which makes biome blending apply to blocks that aren't coloured by biome.

This mod adds a whitelist of block class names and block IDs which blending should be applied to, and everything else is left untouched.
